name: get_serp_results
description: Fetch live Google organic search results for 1-10 keywords. Use this to inspect who ranks for a query, verify competitors, compare SERPs across keywords, or gather source URLs before content planning. Charges credits per keyword (~30-60 each). Does not save results to OpenSEO. Per-keyword errors don't fail the batch.

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

locationCode.description: DataForSEO location code. Defaults to 2840 (United States). See dataforseo.com/help-center/locations.

queries.description: 1-10 queries. Bulk-friendly — prefer this over multiple single-query calls.
